headline: A Look At Abbott Laboratories ABT Valuation After New Cancerguard Early Cancer Detection Data
summary: Abbott Laboratories (ABT) is back in focus after presenting new multi-biomarker data for its Cancerguard multi cancer early detection test at the 2026 American Association for Cancer Research meeting, alongside recognition for DETECT-A study outcomes. See our latest analysis for Abbott Laboratories. The latest Cancerguard data drop and recent first quarter earnings come against a weaker backdrop, with a 30 day share price return of 13.07% decline and a 1 year total shareholder return of...
